migrations.name: create_decision_shadow_store_v1
statements:
CREATE TABLE internal_decision_records (
    decision_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_version INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (strategy_version > 0),
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_signal_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    evaluated_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    evaluated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    outcome TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (outcome IN ('COMMAND', 'NO_ACTION', 'REJECTED')),
    reason_code TEXT NOT NULL,
    command_id TEXT,
    input_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    policy_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    input_payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    UNIQUE (
        strategy_id,
        strategy_version,
        deployment_id,
        instrument_id,
        source_signal_id,
        input_hash,
        policy_hash
    )
)

CREATE INDEX internal_decision_records_time_idx
ON internal_decision_records (
    instrument_id,
    evaluated_at_ts
)

CREATE TABLE internal_strategy_command_requests (
    command_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    decision_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    strategy_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    strategy_version INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (strategy_version > 0),
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    instrument_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_signal_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    expires_at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
    command_kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (command_kind IN ('OPEN', 'REVERSE')),
    desired_target_side TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (desired_target_side IN ('LONG', 'SHORT')),
    desired_target_quantity INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (desired_target_quantity > 0),
    policy_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (decision_id)
        REFERENCES internal_decision_records(decision_id),
    UNIQUE (
        strategy_id,
        strategy_version,
        deployment_id,
        instrument_id,
        source_signal_id,
        policy_hash
    )
)

CREATE INDEX internal_strategy_command_requests_time_idx
ON internal_strategy_command_requests (
    instrument_id,
    created_at_ts
)

CREATE VIEW public_decision_records_v1 AS
SELECT
    decision_id,
    strategy_id,
    strategy_version,
    deployment_id,
    instrument_id,
    source_signal_id,
    evaluated_at_ts,
    evaluated_at_utc,
    outcome,
    reason_code,
    command_id,
    input_hash,
    policy_hash,
    payload_json
FROM internal_decision_records

CREATE VIEW public_strategy_command_requests_v1 AS
SELECT
    command_id,
    decision_id,
    strategy_id,
    strategy_version,
    deployment_id,
    instrument_id,
    source_signal_id,
    created_at_ts,
    expires_at_ts,
    command_kind,
    desired_target_side,
    desired_target_quantity,
    policy_hash,
    payload_json
FROM internal_strategy_command_requests
